title: Loop
description: A factory loop keeps iterating under you-agent-factory until the goal is done.
openingSummary: A factory loop is work that keeps iterating under you-agent-factory until the goal is done.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: A factory loop is work that keeps iterating under you-agent-factory until the goal is done, or until you take an explicit stop or terminal path. It is not a one-shot chat reply that ends when a single answer finishes.

whyItMatters.title: Why It Matters
whyItMatters.body: Long-running goals stay persistent across agent passes, so you can tell when a loop format fits versus a single submit.

simpleExample.title: Simple Example
simpleExample.body: Start or continue a named run, submit work the factory can cycle on, and keep going until the goal is done or you stop.

commonConfusions.title: Common Confusions
commonConfusions.body: A factory loop is not a one-shot chat, a write-review loop with draft and review gates, a programming for or while loop, or a Cursor-driven dynamic workflow.
